channel.title: Emerald Pointe – Tide & Wind Conditions
channel.description: Daily marine forecast with tide & wind info for Punta Gorda

item.title: Marine Conditions for Saturday, May 02
item.description: 🌊 High Tide: 05:26 AM (1.183 ft) ··· 🌊 Low Tide: 09:24 AM (1.002 ft) ··· 💨 Wind: SW 21 G 32 mph
